body:
I didn't see any breaking changes from the [release notes](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/releases) being used here, so I assume we can just bump the compat.

I'd like to merge this after https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/768 so that change is included in the release
title: (0.9.3) allow Oceananigans v0.105 and v0.106
